senses.gloss: to come to, arrive at, to reach
to be old, to be ancient
to let precede, to make precede, to send ahead, to dispatch
to set forth beforehand, to place at the front, to place at the head
to do earlier, to do beforehand
to prepare, to get ready, to make ready
to provide, to set aside, to earmark, to make provision
to offer, to proffer, to tender
to present, to produce, to exhibit, to display
to hand over, to deliver, to give, to hand over, to grant

examples.text: يقدِّم لنا يهوه في الكتاب المقدس إرشادات أخلاقية توجِّهنا حين نأخذ قرارات مهمة في حياتنا.
examples.english: In the Bible, Jehovah gives us moral guidance to guide us as we make important decisions in our lives.

senses.gloss: to submit, to refer, to lay before, to offer up

etymology.text: From Proto-Semitic *q-d-m (“to precede, come before”). Compare Hebrew קדם and Classical Syriac ܩܕܡ.
